---
title: "Next Steps Quest: Continue Your CS Journey"
subtitle: "Take Your Next Steps Toward a CS Adventure at Allegheny"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.quest-badge}
🗺️ NEXT STEPS QUEST | Difficulty: Beginner | Time: 2 minutes
:::

::: {.hero}
# 🎯 Your CS Adventure Awaits!

You've completed the College Fair Demo Track! Now let's map out your next steps.
:::

## 🎮 You've Completed 5 Quests!

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**🏆 Your Achievements:**

✅ **Welcome Quest** - Discovered what Computer Science really is  
✅ **Discovery Quest** - Found CS hidden in your daily life  
✅ **Career Quest** - Explored CS opportunities at Allegheny  
✅ **First Code Quest** - Wrote your first Rust programs!  
✅ **Next Steps Quest** - You're here now!

**You're officially ready to continue the adventure!**
:::

## 🚀 What's Next? Choose Your Path!

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 📚 Path 1: Keep Learning on This Site
**Continue the Rust Quest Adventure**

We have **19 more interactive quests** ready for you:

- Start with [Quest 1: Variables](../lessons/01-variables.qmd)
- Progress through fundamentals (Quests 1-8)
- Build real programs (Quests 9-13)
- Master advanced patterns (Quests 14-19)

**Time:** Self-paced, 8-10 minutes per quest  
**Perfect for:** Learning at home after the fair

[View All 19 Quests →](../all-quests.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎓 Path 2: Visit Allegheny's CS Department
**Meet Faculty, Tour Labs, Experience Campus**

Schedule a campus visit:

- Tour our CS labs and facilities
- Meet professors and current students
- Sit in on a real CS class
- Ask all your questions

**Contact:**
- 📧 [cs@allegheny.edu](mailto:cs@allegheny.edu)
- 🌐 [cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)
- 📞 Call Admissions to schedule

[Schedule a Visit →](https://allegheny.edu/visit)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 💬 Path 3: Talk to CS People Today!
**Connect at the College Fair**

- 🎓 Talk to CS professors here at the fair
- 👥 Meet current CS students
- 💼 Ask about internships and careers
- 📋 Get information on courses and programs

**Don't be shy!** We LOVE talking about CS, and all your questions are welcome!
:::

</div>

## 📱 Save This Site!

Make sure you can find your way back to these Rust Quests:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**🔖 Bookmark This Site**

Scan this QR code or save the URL:

[YOUR WEBSITE URL HERE]

**Or email yourself the link right now!**
:::

## 📋 Your Action Checklist

Here's what you can do **right now** to continue your CS journey:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**Today at the Fair:**

- [ ] Talk to a CS professor or student
- [ ] Pick up CS department materials
- [ ] Save this website URL
- [ ] Ask your burning questions!

**This Week:**

- [ ] Complete Quests 1-5 on this site
- [ ] Explore [Rust Playground](https://play.rust-lang.org/)
- [ ] Email the CS department with questions
- [ ] Tell a friend about CS!

**This Month:**

- [ ] Schedule an Allegheny campus visit
- [ ] Research CS + your interests
- [ ] Try building a small project
- [ ] Follow Allegheny CS on social media

**Before Applying:**

- [ ] Complete more Rust Quests (shoot for 10+)
- [ ] Attend an Allegheny CS department event
- [ ] Talk to your school counselor about CS
- [ ] Explore CS scholarship opportunities
:::

## 🎓 Programs to Consider

Remember, you have options at Allegheny:

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎓 Computer Science Major
**For students who want to go deep into CS**

- Core programming & algorithms
- Software engineering
- AI, cybersecurity, databases
- Research opportunities
- Senior capstone project

**Leads to:** Software engineer, data scientist, AI researcher, etc.
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### ⭐ Computer Science Minor
**Pair CS with your primary interest**

- Foundation in programming
- Problem-solving skills
- Applied computing
- Flexible electives

**Leads to:** CS-enhanced careers in any field
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🧪 Just Try a Course!
**No commitment, just exploration**

- Start with CMPSC 100
- See if you enjoy it
- No prior experience needed
- Can switch to major/minor later

**Perfect for:** Testing the waters
:::

</div>

## 💼 Career Reminder

Computer Science graduates are in high demand:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**Quick Stats:**

- 💵 Median salary: $100,530/year
- 📈 15% job growth through 2032
- 🌍 Work from anywhere opportunities
- 🚀 Endless career possibilities
- 🎯 Skills that apply to every industry
:::

## 🙋 Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do I need prior programming experience?**  
A: **No!** Most CS students start with zero experience. That's what classes are for!

**Q: Is CS just sitting alone coding all day?**  
A: **No!** CS involves teamwork, creativity, problem-solving, and communication. Many CS jobs involve lots of collaboration.

**Q: Can I combine CS with my other interests?**  
A: **Absolutely!** CS pairs with everything: biology, art, business, psychology, music, and more.

**Q: What if I'm not good at math?**  
A: CS uses some math, but it's more about **logical thinking** and **problem-solving**. If you enjoy puzzles and patterns, you'll do great!

**Q: Can I change my mind later?**  
A: **Yes!** You can start as a major and switch to minor (or vice versa). You can even just take one course to try it out.

**Q: Will AI replace programmers?**  
A: **No!** AI is a *tool* that makes programmers more productive. The demand for people who understand CS and can use AI effectively is skyrocketing!

## 🎉 Thanks for Joining the Quest!

::: {.hero}
You've taken the first step into the world of Computer Science. Whether you become a CS major, minor, or just someone who understands technology better, this knowledge will serve you well.

**The adventure is just beginning!** 🚀
:::

::: {.quest-complete}
### ✨ College Fair Demo Track Complete!

You've finished all 5 demo quests. Ready to dive deeper?

**Continue Your Journey:**

- [🦀 Start Quest 1: Variables →](../lessons/01-variables.qmd)
- [📚 View All 19 Quests →](../all-quests.qmd)
- [🏠 Return to Home Page →](../index.qmd)
:::

---

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**📞 Stay Connected**

**Allegheny College - Department of Computer and Information Science**

🌐 Website: [www.allegheny.edu](https://www.allegheny.edu)  
📧 Email: [cs@allegheny.edu](mailto:cs@allegheny.edu)  
📱 Social: Follow @AlleghenyCS

**Questions? Contact:**

- Oliver Bonham-Carter
- Email: [obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- Website: [https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)

**We can't wait to see what you'll build!** 🎓
:::
